# ============================================================
# .cursorignore for STM32CubeIDE projects
# Version: 1.0
# Purpose: Track only USER-EDITABLE files, ignore CubeMX-generated
# Place this file in the ROOT folder of your CubeIDE project
# ============================================================

# === CubeMX auto-generated (DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY) ===
Drivers/
Middlewares/

# === CubeMX project metadata ===
*.ioc
.mxproject

# === CubeIDE build output ===
Debug/
Release/

# === CubeIDE workspace metadata ===
.settings/
*.launch
.cproject
.project

# === Compiled objects ===
*.o
*.d
*.elf
*.hex
*.bin
*.map
*.list
*.srec

# === OS junk ===
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
desktop.ini

# === DOCUMENTATION / Images (optional — uncomment if needed) ===
# *.pdf
# *.png
# *.jpg
# *.svg

# ============================================================
# EXPLICIT INCLUSIONS (override any directory ignore above)
# These are the ONLY files you should edit in CubeIDE
# ============================================================
!Core/Src/**
!Core/Inc/**

# === Scheduler project-specific files ===
!Core/Src/scheduler.c
!Core/Src/scheduler.h       # if placed in Src (not Inc)
!Core/Src/tasks.c
!Core/Src/task_sensor.c
!Core/Src/task_menu.c
!Core/Src/ds18b20.c
!Core/Src/devices.c
!Core/Src/uart_io.c
!Core/Src/events.c

!Core/Inc/scheduler.h
!Core/Inc/tasks.h
!Core/Inc/task_sensor.h
!Core/Inc/task_menu.h
!Core/Inc/ds18b20.h
!Core/Inc/devices.h
!Core/Inc/uart_io.h
!Core/Inc/events.h

# === Startup (usually auto-generated but sometimes edited) ===
# Uncomment if you need to track startup files:
# !Core/Startup/**

# === Linker script (sometimes edited for heap/stack) ===
# Uncomment if needed:
# !STM32F103C8Tx_FLASH.ld

# === CubeIDE config (optional — uncomment to track) ===
# !.cproject
# !.project
